name: Total knee arthroplasty
description: Surgical replacement of a damaged knee joint with an artificial implant. Often planned weeks in advance — a classic shoppable procedure.

name: Total hip arthroplasty
description: Surgical replacement of the hip joint. Compare facility quality and bundled pricing before scheduling.

name: Cataract removal with IOL
description: Outpatient lens replacement to restore vision. Prices vary widely even within the same metro area.

name: Colonoscopy, diagnostic
description: Screening or diagnostic colonoscopy. Facility fees often dominate the total cost.

name: MRI brain without contrast
description: Magnetic resonance imaging of the brain. Imaging centers often beat hospital outpatient prices.

name: Inguinal hernia repair
description: Surgical repair of an inguinal hernia. Laparoscopic vs open approach affects pricing.
